basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026 – 29 Technician Posts | Apply Online by 25 June 2026
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Vijaypur, Jammu has released an official Employment Notification for 29 non-faculty posts on a purely contract basis. The recruitment covers 10 types of technician roles including Cath Lab Technician, Medical Lab Technician, and Operation Theatre Technician, among others. The online application portal opened on 11 June 2026 and the last date to fill the online application form is 25 June 2026. The hard copy of the application must reach AIIMS Jammu by 30 June 2026. A fixed monthly remuneration of Rs. 51,684 is offered for all selected posts.

application_fee.details: The application fee for AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026 is Rs. 1,000/- for all candidates. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid at the time of submitting the online application. No mention of fee exemption for any category is made in the official notification.

qualification.details: Each post in AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026 carries specific educational qualification and experience requirements. The upper age limit for all posts is 35 years. The cut-off date to determine eligibility — including the result of the qualifying degree examination — is the last date of filling the online application form, i.e., 25 June 2026. Only experience acquired after obtaining the qualifying degree or diploma will be counted. | Candidates who have been awarded degrees from foreign Universities or Medical Colleges must enclose an Equivalence Certificate issued by the Association of Indian Universities, New Delhi, or the NMC, as applicable.

salary_details.details: All candidates selected under AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026 will receive a fixed monthly remuneration of Rs. 51,684/-. This is a flat contractual pay and is uniform across all 10 post types. Selected candidates will not be entitled to Provident Fund, NPS subscription deductions, Gratuity, Medical Attendance Treatment, Seniority, Promotion, or any other benefits available to regular government servants.

selection_process: Selection for AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Applied Test and/or Interview carrying a total of 100 marks. Candidates will be provisionally permitted to appear in the applied test based on the information provided in their application form
without prior scrutiny of documents. Document verification of only those candidates who appear for the applied test/interview will be conducted by the Institute's scrutiny committee.
Stage 1: Applied Test / Interview (100 marks total). The date will be notified separately on www.aiimsjammu.edu.in. Venue: Academic Block
Jammu – 181134. Stage 2: Document Verification at the time of the test/interview and before joining. Tie-breaking rule: In case two or more candidates score equal marks at the cut-off

the older candidate (earlier date of birth) will be ranked higher. A waiting list will be maintained for candidates who are otherwise eligible but could not be accommodated in available posts. Vacancies arising due to non-joining or resignation of selected candidates will be offered from this waiting list in order of merit/category.

Final results will be published on the AIIMS Jammu official website at www.aiimsjammu.edu.in only. Selected candidates must join on or before the date stipulated in the offer letter; failure to join will result in the selection being cancelled.
how_to_apply: The application process requires candidates to complete both an online submission and a physical hard copy submission. Both steps are mandatory — submitting only the online form without sending the hard copy will result in cancellation. Candidates should scan all documents in legible quality before starting the form, as no amendment or editing is allowed after submission in fields such as Name, Date of Birth, Post Applied, or Category.
Visit the official AIIMS Jammu website at www.aiimsjammu.edu.in and click on the "APPLY" link for the application form.
Scan and keep ready: proof of date of birth, qualifying degree, registration certificate, passport-size photograph, signature, thumb impression, and valid identity proof.
Fill in the online application form carefully. Ensure no column is left blank.
Pay the application fee of Rs. 1,000/- (non-refundable) through the online payment gateway.
Submit the online application form before 25 June 2026.
Take a printout of the submitted application form, self-attest every page including all attachments, and speed post it to the following address so it is received by 30 June 2026:
Administrative Officer, Academic Block, 5th Floor, All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Vijaypur, Jammu – 181134

Retain a copy of the application form until the completion of the recruitment process. Any corrigendum or revision will be posted on www.aiimsjammu.edu.in only — candidates should check the website regularly.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to fill the online application form is 25 June 2026. The hard copy of the application must be submitted (by hand or post) and received by the Institute by 30 June 2026. Both deadlines are mandatory.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 29 vacancies have been notified across 10 technician posts including Cath Lab Technician, Medical Lab Technician, Operation Theatre & Anaesthesia Technician, and others. The number may increase or decrease at the time of selection.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for all 10 posts is 35 years. The official notification does not specify a minimum age limit or age relaxation details for reserved categories beyond the upper limit of 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1,000/- (non-refundable) for all candidates. The fee must be paid online at the time of submitting the application form.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for selected candidates in AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: All selected candidates will receive a fixed monthly remuneration of Rs. 51,684/-. This is uniform for all posts. Selected candidates are not entitled to PF, NPS, Gratuity, Medical Attendance Treatment, or any other regular government service benefits.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on an Applied Test and/or Interview carrying 100 marks. The date of the applied test will be notified separately on the official website. In case of a tie in marks, the older candidate (earlier date of birth) will be ranked higher.

faq.question: Q7. Is the appointment permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The appointment is purely on a contract basis, valid up to 31 October 2026 or until regular posts sanctioned by MoHFW are filled, whichever is earlier. There is no right to claim absorption, extension, or permanent employment.

faq.question: Q8. Is a hard copy of the application mandatory for AIIMS Jammu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. After submitting the online application, candidates must take a printout, self-attest every page including attachments, and speed post it to the Administrative Officer at AIIMS Vijaypur, Jammu – 181134 so it is received by 30 June 2026. Failure to submit the hard copy by this date will lead to cancellation of candidature.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification is available on the AIIMS Jammu website at www.aiimsjammu.edu.in. All corrigenda, revision notices, and results will also be published exclusively on this website.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are needed for AIIMS Jammu Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need proof of date of birth, qualifying degree/diploma, experience certificates, registration certificate (if applicable), valid identity proof (Aadhaar/PAN/Passport/Driving Licence), passport-size photograph, signature, and thumb impression. Original documents along with two sets of self-attested photocopies must be produced at the time of the applied test/interview and before joining.

faq.answer: The last date to fill the online application form is 25 June 2026. The hard copy of the application must be submitted (by hand or post) and received by the Institute by 30 June 2026. Both deadlines are mandatory.
